case_title: NEIL RICHARD HILTZ VS. AUTO RETURN CLAIMS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILTZ, NEIL RICHARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN CLAIMS THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S ACTIONS CAUSED THE DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN CLAIMS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HILTZ, NEIL RICHARD AS TO DEFENDANT AUTO RETURN CLAIMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-15-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-15-2010 - JUDGMENT.
